user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee, so that they are registered in the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Master screen; When I click Add new employee and enter the required details; Then the new employee is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view employees with their code, name, user name, class, department, and designation, so that I have a directory of the workforce
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Master screen; When the list loads; Then each employee shows employee code, first and last name, user name, employee class, department, and designation

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter between active and inactive employees and Display the results, so that I can view the relevant workforce
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Master screen; When I choose Active or Inactive employees and click Display; Then only employees in that state are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search employees by name, so that I can quickly locate a specific person
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Master screen; When I enter an employee name; Then matching employees are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the employee list, so that I can browse a large workforce in manageable chunks
acceptance_criteria: Given the employee list spans many pages; When I use the pagination controls; Then the next set of employees is displayed
